title: Assigning and grouping
excerpt:
I am trying to group tasks by the individuals assigned 
The automation " when _____ is assigned , move item to group " - but what exactly does this mean. It really means when “column” is assigned move item to group right…

posts.author: AnthonytheEngineer (Anthony Gude)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to group tasks by the individuals assigned

The automation " when _____ is assigned , move item to group " - but what exactly does this mean. It really means when “column” is assigned move item to group right?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AnthonytheEngineer, thanks for posting and welcome to the community! What this automation really means is “When person x is selected in people column, move item to group A”. Does that make sense? You would have to assign someone in the people column to trigger the automation:

image1736×498 55.8 KB

posts.author: AnthonytheEngineer (Anthony Gude)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I ended up using an automation that moves to board depending on selected user is assigned. With your clarification, I read this as working in a similar fashion.
